title: Roast Beef Tenderloin with Roasted Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring a tender roast beef tenderloin roasted to perfection with a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Season the beef tenderloin with salt, pepper, and garlic.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef tenderloin for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer it to the oven.
Roast the beef in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the beef is roasting, toss the chopped vegetables in a bowl with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Remove the beef from the oven and let it rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced beef with the roasted vegetables.
